text.tspan: 💡 KEY INSIGHT: The crossover threshold is NOT fixed at 15%.
It varies based on: index depth, page clustering, I/O vs CPU costs.
The optimizer must compute this dynamically per query.
SeqScan Cost = page_count × io_weight + row_count × cpu_weight
(Constant: reads all pages regardless of selectivity)
IndexScan Cost = matching_pages × io_weight + matching_rows × cpu_weight + index_lookup
Use index for few matching rows
